refnamediv.refpurpose: recovers objects names in an equation

listitem.para: * eq = a string of the form : 'varendo = coefi*varex1+...+coefj*varexk' with varexi possibly lacking
* coef = a string vector of the form coef = ['coef1';...;'coefn']
* namey = the name of the rhs variable
* ncoefeqi = a (nx1) vector of the indexes of coefi,...,coefj in coef
* lexo = a (nx1) vector of names of the exogenous variables

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Recovers from an equation the name of the endogenous variable, the indexes of the coefficients (in a vector) and the names of the exogenous variables (also in a vector).

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
refsection.programlisting:
[nyi,ncoefi,lexoi]=eqlist('y1=c1*x1+c2*x2',['c1';'c2'])
//Extracts in nyi y1, in ncoefi [1;2] and in lexoi ['x1';'x2'].
